entries.claim_text: Shepherd: Enabling Programmable Meta-Agents via Reversible Agentic Execution Traces
entries.quoted_snippet: Enabling Programmable Meta-Agents via Reversible Agentic Execution Traces

entries.claim_text: Simon Yu, Derek Chong, Ananjan Nandi, Dilara Soylu, Jiuding Sun, Christopher D. Manning, Weiyan Shi
entries.quoted_snippet: Simon Yu

entries.claim_text: https://github.com/shepherd-agents/shepherd
entries.quoted_snippet: https://github.com/shepherd-agents/shepherd

entries.claim_text: Venue Kind: paper (arXiv preprint 2605.10913)
CooperBench runtime supervision: pair pass rate coop 28.8% to Opus 54.7%, near solo 57.2%; hatched overlay is meta-agent overhead.
entries.quoted_snippet: Runtime supervision experiments on CooperBench

entries.claim_text: LiveCodeBench: CRO reaches higher held-out test pass-rate at lower optimization wall-clock than baseline/GEPA/MetaHarness.
entries.quoted_snippet: held-out test pass-rate versus optimization wall-clock

entries.claim_text: 當我們想在它「之上」再放一個 agent 來監督、除錯、最佳化或訓練它時
entries.quoted_snippet: higher-order agents that operate over other agents

entries.claim_text: Shepherd 的主張是把「一個 agent 的執行」變成**一等物件**
entries.quoted_snippet: an agent's execution is itself a

entries.claim_text: Shepherd 把四個東西提升為一等物件
entries.quoted_snippet: Fork execution state

entries.claim_text: 執行歷史被存成一張 content-addressed、Git-like 的 commit graph
entries.quoted_snippet: persistent Git-like commit graph

entries.claim_text: shepherd checkout -b <child-branch>
entries.quoted_snippet: shepherd checkout -b

entries.claim_text: 一個 effect 分成兩筆事件:agent 送出動作時的 **intent**
entries.quoted_snippet: when the worker issues the action, and an

entries.claim_text: 每個 effect 帶一個 **reversibility tier**
entries.quoted_snippet: Every effect carries a reversibility tier

entries.claim_text: COMPENSABLE = auto()
entries.quoted_snippet: COMPENSABLE = auto()  # Requires compensation action (send correction email)

entries.claim_text: filesystem 寫入這類 AUTO 效果原生可回滾
entries.quoted_snippet: compensable effects roll back through user-supplied compensation handlers

entries.claim_text: Shepherd 的 `fork` 是在既有 filesystem 上疊一層 copy-on-write
entries.quoted_snippet: creates a new copy-on-write layer on top of the existing filesystem

entries.claim_text: 134 ms
entries.quoted_snippet: 134 ms

entries.claim_text: 不論 image 從 42 MB 到 5.8 GB,fork 都維持在 134–143 ms
entries.quoted_snippet: regardless of image size

entries.claim_text: 框架宣稱 replay 時「重用超過 95% 的 KV cache」
entries.quoted_snippet: the provider's prompt cache resolves it without invalidation

entries.claim_text: 實際 savings% 的平均只有約 70%
entries.quoted_snippet: Savings climb sharply

entries.claim_text: 無監督的 coop baseline 只有 28.8% pair pass,solo 天花板 57.2%
entries.quoted_snippet: coop baseline lands at {28.8\%} pair pass rate, reproducing CooperBench's documented coordination penalty against the solo ceiling of {57.2\%}

entries.claim_text: solo 每對 28.4 min,coop 19.8 min
entries.quoted_snippet: per pair on average

entries.claim_text: 在「該 edit 首個會被影響到的 commit」fork parent 的 trace,只重跑之後的 suffix
entries.quoted_snippet: at the first commit that would be affected by the edit and replays the suffix

entries.claim_text: CRO 於四個拿到最佳 test(HoVer 79.4、MATH 80.0、LiveCodeBench 51.0、TB2.0 35.2)
entries.quoted_snippet: obtains the best performance on four of five datasets

entries.claim_text: Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 從 Flat GRPO 的 34.2% 升到 39.4%
entries.quoted_snippet: points respectively

entries.claim_text: Core-0/Core-A 等 fragment)用 Lean 機械化證明
entries.quoted_snippet: Machine execution extends traces by appending records

entries.claim_text: CooperBench 記錄了並行 coding agent 協調不良、甚至不如單 agent 的「curse of coordination」
entries.quoted_snippet: parallel coding agents coordinate poorly enough that they succeed less often than a single agent

entries.claim_text: 監督者每 5 秒才被呼叫一次,而且看到的是**壓縮後的快照**
entries.quoted_snippet: the trailing 25 tool-call summaries

entries.claim_text: 沒有做能把「介入正確」與「單純多塞了一個更強的模型進 loop」分離開來的消融
entries.quoted_snippet: We treat this as a proof of existence

entries.claim_text: 被重用的是**共享 prefix** 的 kv cache,不是整段對話
entries.quoted_snippet: the only cost paid by the meta-agent is the executed suffix

entries.claim_text: proof envelope **不**驗證 Python 控制流、model 輸出、prompt-cache 狀態
entries.quoted_snippet: The proof envelope does not verify arbitrary Python

entries.claim_text: Shepherd 讓「錯了可以便宜地回滾」,但沒有讓「事前知道這步是對的」
entries.quoted_snippet: at the first commit that would be affected by the edit and replays the suffix

entries.claim_text: 對短任務,meta-agent 的 token 成本可能超過 worker 本身
entries.quoted_snippet: the meta-agent's token cost can exceed the worker's

entries.claim_text: 摘要與 intro 大量使用**相對百分比**(27.5%、12.8%),而其絕對增益是 +11 分與 +4 分
entries.quoted_snippet: obtains the best performance on four of five datasets

entries.claim_text: 生產 Python 執行預設是 `runtime_only`(不帶證明)
entries.quoted_snippet: The fallback is therefore usable for small repositories but unsuitable for large ones

entries.claim_text: 在 5.8 GB image 上,fork 對 full-rootfs copy 的加速由 Table 2 相除為 53,462 / 143 ≈ 374×;論文正文把此值寫成 192×,與其自身 Table 2 不一致。
冷啟時貼近 0%、之後才攤還爬升
entries.quoted_snippet: cold first proposer session of every dataset

entries.claim_text: 兩條曲線的分離帶並不寬
entries.quoted_snippet: robustness across model families and benchmarks at scale

entries.claim_text: CRO 在 LiveCodeBench 上的逐 session 計算重用率非單調:session 1 與 session 6 貼近約 1% 的冷啟,中間攤還爬升,最高約 62%(圖 x4,已開圖核對,並對映 aid.tex:1538 冷啟限制)。
entries.quoted_snippet: Computation reuse on LiveCodeBench with \cbo{}

entries.claim_text: 跨兩個 worker 家族與兩個 benchmark,68–82% 的成功軌跡可被進一步壓縮,平均長度大致砍半(圖 x5;壓縮率見 aid.tex:1932-1934)。
entries.quoted_snippet: Trajectory compression across two worker model families and two benchmarks

entries.claim_text: 成功軌跡中有 68–82% 能被進一步壓縮,平均長度大致砍半
entries.quoted_snippet: drops from 21.4 to 8.9 model calls (Sonnet) and from 19.0 to 8.8 (GPT-5.4 high) on SWE-Bench~Verified, and from 15.8 to 7.1 and 11.4 to 5.2 on Terminal-Bench~v2.0

entries.claim_text: Endless Terminals 未見測試集上,Tree-GRPO 在兩個基座都爬升並穩定在比 Flat GRPO 更高的獎勵(圖 x17,已開圖核對)。
entries.quoted_snippet: Tree-GRPO climbs to and stabilises at a higher held-out reward than Flat GRPO on both base models

entries.claim_text: 訓練期原始獎勵上,Tree-GRPO(K=4)早期與 Flat GRPO 交錯、部分區間(Qwen 約 step 5–45、Nemotron 約 step 20–55)甚至一度更低,約 step 50–60 後才穩定拉開,並在兩個基座上都以更高獎勵收尾。論文原圖 caption 稱『at every rollout step 都更高』,經開圖核對與早期交錯不符,本筆記採實際可見趨勢。
entries.quoted_snippet: Tree-GRPO ($K{=}4$, teal) reaches higher reward than Flat GRPO (red) at every rollout step
